title: Graphene Transparent, Flexible Brand New Solar Cell
description: This is the follow on to Birth of a new solar cell. Basically I mixed in some graphene and painted it onto a piece of plastic you can find the original video here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aNGoXjQpU0E and you can visit my website here: http://www.fwgltd.co.uk - if you feel like helping out
